headline: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Prices Rise As Trump Says 'Clock Is Ticking' For Iran; Nvidia Earnings Ahead
summary: The stock market is near highs but oil prices and yields are headwinds with Trump issuing new Iran threats. Nvidia and Walmart earnings loom.

raw.summary: The stock market is near highs but oil prices and yields are headwinds with Trump issuing new Iran threats. Nvidia and Walmart earnings loom.

headline: Stock Futures Drift Lower and Brent Oil Passes $110 a Barrel Amid Iran Impasse
summary: Stock futures are drifting lower on Sunday ahead of earnings reports from  Nvidia  and  Walmart  this week and after President Donald Trump returned from a trip to China.  Just after 6 p.m., Dow Jones Industrial Average futures ticked lower 0.2%, and S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 futures also fell about 0.1%.  WTI crude ticked higher to $107 a barrel, while Brent crude rose above $110 a barrel.

headline: Stock, Oil Futures Poised to Start Trading Amid Iran Impasse
summary: Futures are poised to open for trading later on Sunday ahead of earnings reports from  Nvidia  and  Walmart  this week and after President Donald Trump returned from a trip to China.  Treasury yields jumped on Friday, with the 30-year rate rising to 5.1% after April inflation numbers came in elevated.  There is no apparent progress on the situation in Iran.

headline: Walmart Balances Compliance Costs And Brand Partnerships As Shares Keep Climbing
summary: Walmart settled a California consumer protection lawsuit over alleged price and weight inaccuracies, addressing concerns about labeling and overcharging. The company is rolling out a limited edition designer hydration collection, tying into lifestyle and wellness trends. Walmart also secured exclusivity for a nostalgic Mountain Dew flavor, using brand partnerships to draw traffic to stores and its online platform. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:WMT, these developments sit alongside a share...
